codex_response:
Implemented `task_140c817e` in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_140c817e/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_140c817e/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_140c817e/generator.py#L1).

Rule summary: every input `1` becomes a crosshair, with its full row and column painted `1`, its diagonal neighbors painted `3`, and the original seed overwritten to `2`. I used the summary hint because it matched the official puzzle exactly; no `notes.md` or new DSL primitive was needed.

The generator stays close to the observed family by sampling square grids of size `9..14`, backgrounds from `{7,8,9}`, and `2-4` well-separated singleton `1` seeds with distinct rows and columns, then constructing the output explicitly in the same style. The core verifier logic is at [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_140c817e/verifier.py#L4), and the sampling/output construction is at [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_140c817e/generator.py#L7).
